source_text: Please state your name for the record.
reference_translation: Por favor diga su nombre para el registro.

source_text: The court is now in session.
I swear to tell the truth, the whole truth, and nothing but the truth.
column5: toda la verdad y nada más que la verdad.

source_text: Your Honor, we request a brief recess.
Let the record reflect that the witness has identified the defendant.
reference_translation: Que conste en actas que el testigo ha identificado al acusado.

source_text: Please state your name for the record.
reference_translation: Por favor diga su nombre para el registro.

source_text: Do you swear to tell the truth, the whole truth, and nothing but the truth?
column5: toda la verdad y nada más que la verdad?

source_text: The bailiff will escort the witness.
We find the defendant not guilty.
The court sentences the defendant to five years.
reference_translation: La corte sentencia al acusado a cinco años.

source_text: The clerk will read the verdict.

reference_translation: La defensa da por concluida su presentación.

source_text: The court finds the defendant not guilty.
reference_translation: La corte declara al acusado no culpable.
